name: Trimble Prolog Construction Project Management API
what_it_does: Trimble Prolog construction project management REST API for document control, RFI management, submittal workflow, meeting minutes, and project communication on commercial construction projects. Enables AI agents to manage RFI creation, routing, and response tracking for automated request-for-information workflow, handle submittal log and approval workflow for shop drawing and material submittal management, access meeting minutes creation and action item tracking for project communication automation, retrieve document control and project log management for construction project record keeping, manage punch list and deficiency tracking for project closeout automation, handle change order log and potential change order management for contract change control, access daily report and field observation logging for project documentation automation, retrieve project directory and contact management for team communication, manage project budget tracking and commitment management for cost reporting, and integrate Trimble Prolog with Trimble Connect, Viewpoint, Primavera P6, and Microsoft Teams for full construction project lifecycle.
use_cases: Managing RFIs from construction communication agents
Tracking submittals from project document agents
Logging daily reports from field operations agents
Managing punch lists from project closeout agents
not_for: Construction accounting and job costing (use Viewpoint or Foundation)
Field crew scheduling and dispatching (use dedicated field ops platforms)
BIM model coordination (use Trimble Connect or Autodesk BIM 360)
best_when: A general contractor or construction manager wanting AI agents to automate RFI management, submittal workflow, meeting minutes, daily reporting, punch list tracking, and project document control within Trimble Prolog as the construction PM system of record.
avoid_when: RFI RESPONSE REVIEW BEFORE DESIGN AUTHORITY ISSUANCE: Automated RFI routing must route to architect or engineer of record for review before automated response issuance to field; automated RFI responses generated or forwarded without licensed design professional review create design-of-record liability and construction defect risk. SUBMITTAL APPROVAL STAMPS AND ENGINEER OF RECORD: Automated submittal approval workflows must route shop drawings to licensed engineer or architect for approval stamp; automated submittal approval without licensed professional review creates construction defect and professional liability exposure. SAFETY INCIDENT REPORTING IN DAILY LOGS: Automated daily report entries that include safety incidents must be separately routed to safety manager and OSHA reporting workflow; automated daily log entry of recordable incidents without safety manager review creates OSHA 300 log misclassification risk. Trimble product portfolio complexity — Prolog is one of multiple Trimble construction products; verify which Trimble products are licensed and integrated before automation design; Prolog data may overlap with Trimble Connect, Viewpoint, or Accubid depending on firm's Trimble product bundle.

auth.notes: Trimble Prolog uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Sunnyvale, California HQ (Trimble Inc., NASDAQ: TRMB). Trimble $3.7B+ annual revenue. Prolog construction PM software acquired from Meridian Project Systems in 2001. Trimble construction portfolio: Prolog, Viewpoint (Vista, Spectrum, TeamWork), Connect (BIM collaboration), Accubid (MEP estimating), Robotic Total Station. Used by large GCs and CMs for document control. Competes with Procore and Oracle Aconex for construction project management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per project or enterprise license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by project or enterprise; API access in enterprise tier; bundled with Trimble construction portfolio
pricing.notes: Sunnyvale CA. Trimble NASDAQ:TRMB. $3.7B+ revenue. Prolog acquired 2001. Large GC and CM target. Per-project or enterprise annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; document and log retrieval throttled per project size

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — DOCUMENT EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Trimble Prolog does not support native webhooks for RFI response, submittal approval, or punch list closure events; automated construction PM workflow requires scheduled polling aligned with project communication cadence

RFI RESPONSE LICENSED PROFESSIONAL REVIEW MANDATORY: Automated RFI routing must never auto-issue RFI responses on behalf of architect or engineer without licensed professional review and approval; automated RFI response forwarding without design professional approval creates construction defect and professional liability exposure

SUBMITTAL APPROVAL STAMP REQUIRES LICENSED ENGINEER: Automated submittal routing for shop drawings must require architect or engineer of record approval stamp before construction use authorization; automated submittal approval without licensed professional review creates construction defect claim exposure

Trimble product portfolio overlap — Prolog document control functionality overlaps with Trimble Connect (BIM collaboration) and Viewpoint Team (field collaboration); automated workflows spanning multiple Trimble products require mapping which Trimble system is master of record for each data type to prevent duplicate document creation

Prolog vs Procore migration for growing contractors — some Prolog customers are migrating to Procore as project volume grows; verify whether firm plans Procore migration before building deep Prolog automation; migration would require automation rebuild

Safety incident field log routing — automated daily report logging that captures safety observations or near-misses must route to safety manager for OSHA evaluation; automated daily log entries without safety routing gate create OSHA 300 log recordable classification and reporting gaps
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction project management. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/AU. RFI, submittal, and project document data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction project management. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/AU. Project document and communication data.
